channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Hegseth: 'We didn't start this war but under President Trump we're finishing it'
item.description: The remarks are the first to reporters since the U.S.-Israeli military operations against Iran began Saturday despite weeks of talks designed to stave off a conflict.
item.content:encoded:
The remarks are the first to reporters since the U.S.-Israeli military operations against Iran began Saturday despite weeks of talks designed to stave off a conflict.

(Image credit: Joe Raedle)
item.dc:creator: NPR Washington Desk

item.title: U.S., Israel's war with Iran widens. And, Texas primaries test Latino support for GOP
item.description: Israel trades fire with Hezbollah, widening the U.S. and Israel's war with Iran into Lebanon. And, Texas primaries could test if Latino support for the GOP remains strong after 2024's gains.
item.content:encoded:
Israel trades fire with Hezbollah, widening the U.S. and Israel's war with Iran into Lebanon. And, Texas primaries could test if Latino support for the GOP remains strong after 2024's gains.

(Image credit: Atta Kenare)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: Ivermectin is making a post-pandemic comeback, among cancer patients
item.description: The anti-parasitic drug became a household name during the COVID-19 pandemic, and it is now being embraced as an alternative treatment for cancer. It is as politically polarizing as ever.
item.content:encoded: The anti-parasitic drug became a household name during the COVID-19 pandemic, and it is now being embraced as an alternative treatment for cancer. It is as politically polarizing as ever.
item.dc:creator: Yuki Noguchi

item.title: Iran war widens, threatening to engulf Lebanon
item.description: The war over Iran engulfed more of the Middle East and beyond on Monday as Lebanon's militant group Hezbollah responded to the killing of Iran's spiritual leader with its first attack on Israel in more than a year.
item.content:encoded:
The war over Iran engulfed more of the Middle East and beyond on Monday as Lebanon's militant group Hezbollah responded to the killing of Iran's spiritual leader with its first attack on Israel in more than a year.

(Image credit: AFP)
item.dc:creator: Jane Arraf

item.title: Peer pressure can make this clownfish change its stripes
item.description: Tomato clownfish, in response to an unpredictable world, appear capable of adjusting when they lose their stripes based on cues from other fish and their habitat, a new study in PLOS Biology finds.
item.content:encoded:
Tomato clownfish, in response to an unpredictable world, appear capable of adjusting when they lose their stripes based on cues from other fish and their habitat, a new study in PLOS Biology finds.

(Image credit: Camille A. Sautereau)
item.dc:creator: Ari Daniel

item.title: Hezbollah strikes Israel as American and Israeli planes pound Iran
item.description: Iran and Iranian-backed militias fired missiles at Israel and Arab states, apparently hitting the U.S. Embassy compound in Kuwait, while Israel and the United States pounded targets in Iran on Monday.
item.content:encoded:
Iran and Iranian-backed militias fired missiles at Israel and Arab states, apparently hitting the U.S. Embassy compound in Kuwait, while Israel and the United States pounded targets in Iran on Monday.

(Image credit: Hassan Ammar)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Congress gears up for vote on Trump's war powers in Iran — after the battle began
item.description: Democrats and a few Republicans are calling for curbing Trump's unilateral use of military power in Iran, despite previous such efforts failing to advance.
item.content:encoded:
Democrats and a few Republicans are calling for curbing Trump's unilateral use of military power in Iran, despite previous such efforts failing to advance.

(Image credit: Chip Somodevilla)
item.dc:creator: Luke Garrett

item.title: Texas primaries could test whether Latino support for GOP is holding after 2024 gains
item.description: The GOP made big strides with Latino voters in 2024. Immigration and the economy were key drivers, but two years later, those issues could sway them to back Democrats in primaries happening this week.
item.content:encoded:
The GOP made big strides with Latino voters in 2024. Immigration and the economy were key drivers, but two years later, those issues could sway them to back Democrats in primaries happening this week.

(Image credit: Elizabeth Conley)
item.dc:creator: Ashley Lopez

item.title: How long do electric vehicle batteries actually last?
item.description: When the modern electric vehicle was still in its infancy, drivers worried that vehicles would need expensive battery replacements within a few years. But battery lifespans are exceeding expectations.
item.content:encoded:
When the modern electric vehicle was still in its infancy, drivers worried that vehicles would need expensive battery replacements within a few years. But battery lifespans are exceeding expectations.

(Image credit: Odd Andersen)
item.dc:creator: Camila Domonoske

item.title: Supreme Court ponders law making it a crime for gun owners to use marijuana
item.description: The law, the same one used to prosecute Joe Biden's son for illegal gun possession, has united an array of strange bedfellows, from conservative gun rights groups to liberal civil liberties groups.
item.content:encoded:
The law, the same one used to prosecute Joe Biden's son for illegal gun possession, has united an array of strange bedfellows, from conservative gun rights groups to liberal civil liberties groups.

(Image credit: Heather Diehl)
item.dc:creator: Nina Totenberg
